zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Vernon於1424年出生在英國德比夏爾皮克 科華士時，她的父親Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight41歲，母親Benedicta de Ludlow32歲。她於1445年之前與John Vampage結婚。她去世於1471年8月4日之後在英國爾克里夫頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Vernon于1424年出生在英国德比夏爾皮克 科華士时，她的父亲Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight41岁，母亲Benedicta de Ludlow32岁。她于1445年之前与John Vampage结婚。她去世于1471年8月4日之后在英国爾克里夫頓。

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Vernon was born in 1424, in Peak Forest, Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight, was 41 and her mother, Benedicta de Ludlow, was 32. She married John Vampage before 1445. She died after 4 August 1471, in Clifton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Vernon est née en 1424, à Peak Forest, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Benedicta de Ludlow, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé John Vampage avant 1445. Elle est décédée après 4 août 1471, à Clifton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Vernon 1424 in Peak Forest, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight 41 und ihre Mutter Benedicta de Ludlow 32. Sie hat vor 1445 John Vampage geheiratet. Sie starb nach 4. August 1471 in Clifton, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Vernon è nata il nel 1424 nel Peak Forest, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Benedicta de Ludlow, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato John Vampage prima del 1445. Morì dopo il 4 agosto 1471, nel Clifton, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Vernonが1424年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアピーク フォーエストで生まれた時，父Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knightは41歳，母Benedicta de Ludlowは32歳であった。1445年以前にJohn Vampageと結婚した。彼女は1471年8月4日以後にイギリスチェシュアイアクリフトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Vernon(이)가 1424년 영국 더비실르 피크 포레스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Benedicta de Ludlow(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1445년 이전 John Vampage(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1471년 8월 4일 이후 영국 체실르 클리프턴에서 사망했다.

mn.Elford, Staffordshire, England, United K: Elford, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Vernon nasceu em 1424, em Peak Forest, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Benedicta de Ludlow, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com John Vampage antes 1445. Ela faleceu após 4 de agosto de 1471, em Clifton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Vernon родилась в 1424 г. в местности пик форест, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Benedicta de Ludlow, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Vampage перед 1445 г. Она умерла после 4 августа 1471 г. в местности клифтон, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Vernon nació en 1424, en Peak Forest, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Benedicta de Ludlow, tenía 32 años. Se casó con John Vampage antes de 1445. Murió después de 4 de agosto de 1471, en Clifton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
